title: Creamy Jamaican Pea Eggplant Grill
description: A buttery and juicy Jamaican dish featuring pea eggplant, perfect for a solo dinner, made with double rise bread and cooked on a raclette grill, following ayurvedic tamasic friendly principles.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toast the double rise bread slices until lightly browned.
Butter one side of each toasted bread slice.
Top each bread slice with a slice of pea eggplant, a sprinkle of chopped onion, and a sprinkle of chopped scotch bonnet peppers.
Season with dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Place the bread slices on the raclette grill, butter side down, and cook for 5 minutes.
Flip the bread slices over and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix the heavy cream with minced garlic and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Drizzle the garlic cream over the pea eggplant and serve immediately.
Serve hot and enjoy as a solo dinner.
